title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 184.612 - Additional indebtedness may be incurred by district with voter approval, amount
text:
184.612.  Additional indebtedness may be incurred by district with voter approval, amount. — The metropolitan zoo district by a vote of the qualified voters thereof voting thereon as now or hereafter required by Section 26(b) of Article VI of the Missouri Constitution may incur an additional indebtedness for the purposes of the district.  The total indebtedness authorized separately by the voters for the respective district shall not exceed five percent of the taxable tangible property therein as shown by the last completed assessment for state and county purposes in the city and the county.
(L. 1990 S.B. 525 § 6)
